failures.test_name: Validate ID Verification Underage Improvements - Underage Registration
failures.key_investigative_step: Computing exact idvBirthdate from AdminPASApiSteps.java formula and comparing against account_created (today - 10 days) — revealing exact 18-year leap-year boundary condition
failures.new_pattern_trigger: Date-sensitive arithmetic in QA step definitions produces boundary failures on specific calendar dates when leap-year spans are involved
failures.new_pattern_protocol: 1. Extract the birthdate/date formula from the step definition. 2. Compute the exact date for the run date. 3. Check if result lands on an exact boundary (18 years, 21 years etc). 4. Fix: anchor to account_created not today, or add safety buffer days.
failures.notes: Root cause: idvBirthdate = today.minusYears(19).plusDays(356) lands on 2008-03-01 when today=2026-03-11, exactly 18 years before account_created (2026-03-01). Strict < 18 returns false. Fix: anchor idvBirthdate to accountCreated.minusYears(18).plusDays(1). Also: face-comparison pattern false-positively matched on generic signature — fixed by removing 'Expected: a string containing' and enforcing keyword_required rule.

failures.test_name: Validation Not Met - Username criteria for Profile Auto-Moderation - Attractive Member (Auto-Approved after First Name Approval)
failures.actual_classification: Inconclusive — shared QA Automation + BE interaction
failures.key_investigative_step: Cross-referencing conditional rendering in approvals.blade.php with dispatchSync call in UpdateProfileEventRequest.php — realising requestData is only passed in async queue path, not sync
failures.notes: Root cause: ProcessDragynTextAssessment::dispatchSync omits Dragyn::getRequestData() — qa_reason never reaches the job. Real Dragyn called instead of mock, returns MODERATE with empty reason. approvals.blade.php @if(!empty(reason)) gates the span. Fix: pass requestData in dispatchSync path in UpdateProfileEventRequest.php

failures.key_investigative_step: Comparing passing vs failing Jenkins console logs — PUT body for Zeus config 504 showed {"value":true} in passing run and {"value":false} in failing run despite step being named 'as Enabled'.
failures.new_pattern_trigger: A setup step named 'as Enabled' or 'as Disabled' sends the wrong boolean value — detectable only by comparing passing vs failing console logs for Zeus/config PUT bodies.
failures.new_pattern_protocol: 1. Find the Zeus config PUT calls in the failing console log. 2. Compare the value sent against a passing run for the same step. 3. If value is inverted relative to the step name, check git log on AdminApiConfigurationDefinitions.java for recent changes. 4. Confirm with git diff.
failures.notes: Commit message 'Updated for testing' strongly suggests temporary debug change never reverted. Lesson: always read assertThat message as a label, not as the element name.

failures.test_name: Validation of Dragyn Photo Moderation with Attractive and Generous Members
failures.key_investigative_step: Serenity recordReportData captured 'Dragyn reason as -> Minor in photo' — revealing the actual Dragyn response before any code investigation.
failures.notes: Two wrong classifications before correct answer. System initially assumed reason was empty. Key lesson: always read Serenity recordReportData for actual Dragyn reason before any code investigation.

failures.test_name: Validate Email Change Restriction for New Accounts and View in Admin
failures.key_investigative_step: Pattern match at Stage 0 — exact Known Instance 1 hit. No additional investigation required.
failures.notes: Second consecutive failure across two branches. Fix not yet applied.

failures.test_name: Validate Email Change Restriction for New Accounts and View in Admin
failures.key_investigative_step: QA team identified that goToLoginPageWithUrl() reorder in b30c74a029 moved deleteAllCookies() to run after adminLoginPage.open() — deleting cookies on admin domain instead of member domain.
failures.notes: System initially classified as FE Code (ModalManager migration 227a0ca07c). Key lesson: always check recent QA commits to shared helpers BEFORE moving to FE/BE investigation.

failures.key_investigative_step: Recognising ProfileWallDefinitions failure post-admin-block is the same admin-session-cookie-survival mechanism as Email Change Restriction.
failures.notes: Original investigation misled by 227a0ca07c touching AfterLoginPCR.tsx. Actual sprint trigger: b30c74a029. Second confirmed instance of admin-session-cookie-survival pattern.
